description.value: Price 8,400 gp; Slot hands; CL 9th; Weight 1/2 lb.; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION Each of these leather gloves has a large, ragged hole in the palm. Upon donning the gloves, the wearer is nauseated with pain for 1 round as the skin on his palms rips open, revealing terrible gashes that each sprout fangs, lips, and a tongue. While the wearerâs hands are empty, he can breathe, eat, drink, and speak through the mouths on his hands (though this doesnât allow him to drink more potions in a round, speak with more than one voice at a time, or otherwise take more actions than normal). The wearer retains the use of his hands; the mouths remain shut while the wearer is holding items in his hands. The wearer receives a +2 enhancement bonus on combat maneuver checks to grapple a foe with his hands. If he begins his turn grappling with his hands, the wearer can make a free bite attack with one of the mouths on his hands. The bite is treated as a natural weapon and deals an amount of damage equal to 1d4 + his Strength modifier for a Medium wearer (1d3 + his Strength modifier if heâs Small). CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 4,200 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells polymorph
